experiences.responsibilities: Managed consumer and business relationships, worked with wealth strategist and financial services, and handled transaction management and risk management. Committed to compliance, governance, and management. Benefited from staffing shortages and supported regional bank operations.

Handled and managed consumer and business loans, achieved top performance in both sectors, and focused on the relationship between bank employees and external departments such as PEOs. Benefited from staffing shortages and supported the opening and management of credit and business loans.

Served as a relationship banker at high-traffic branch, worked with commercial ending to support and approve high-volume of PP loans for new and existing business customers during the pandemic. Opened and managed consumer and business loans.
Opened and managed consumer and business loans, supported local branch operations, and provided services to local customers.
Worked with a staff team to design and implement systems to manually process claims. Supported public employers after the implementation of STATE INSURANCE EXCHANGE.

skills.interests: Performing and composing music, painting, home decorating, and other creative activities.
